401.title: Login Required
401.description: You need to log in to view this page.

403.title: Access Denied
403.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been moved.

500.title: Server Error
500.description: Sorry, something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.description: The system is currently being updated. Please try again later.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.contact_admin: Please contact the administrator to activate required extensions.
